title: Trump’s Iran Proposal Has Echoes of Half-Finished Gaza Deal
summary_full: President Trump’s proposal to end the war with Iran would delay tackling the most contentious issues — a tactic that has had mixed results in Gaza.
summary_public: President Trump’s proposal to end the war with Iran would delay tackling the most contentious issues — a tactic that has had mixed results in Gaza.
